data.title: Global edge security market to grow to $136.5 billion by 2034 at 20.1% CAGR, driven by SASE adoption and 5G networks.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on October 9, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide edge security market is rapidly expanding as a result of the increasing adoption of secure access service edge (SASE) and the growing prevalence of 5G networks. The rise in remote and hybrid work environments is also fueling this market growth.

data.title: Azimut uncovers high-grade lithium surface discovery on Wabamisk East Property in Quebec. Extensive lithium pegmatite field exposed with multi-kilometre scale.
data.description: Large lithium pegmatite field discovered through mechanical stripping, spanning several kilometers in size. This significant find expands the mining potential in the area, with the pegmatite field showing promising lithium reserves. The field covers a vast area of X kilometers and is expected to play a crucial role in supplying lithium for various industries. The utilization of mechanical stripping facilitated the exposure of this extensive lithium deposit, indicating substantial opportunities for future extraction and production.

data.title: Genvor (GNVR) restores trading status, expands research network across 3 continents, with 4 active collaborations.
data.description: In Woodland, CA, on October 9, 2025, Genvor, Inc. (OTCID: GNVR), a leader in AI-accelerated peptide technology for sustainable agriculture, declared its regained active OTCQB trading status on OTC Markets. This move enables the company to expedite capital generation as it expands field trials globally across various continents and crop sectors. The reinstatement underscores Genvor's dedication to adherence, openness, and sustained progress as it progresses with four active research and development partnerships across three continents, aiming to revamp agricultural practices.

data.title: Bluejay Diagnostics and SanyoSeiko deepen partnership to commercialize Symphony Platform for critical care testing.
data.description: In Acton, Massachusetts and Yamanashi, Japan, on October 9, 2025, Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. (NASDAQ: BJDX) revealed an update. Bluejay, a medical diagnostics firm concentrating on rapid near-patient testing for critical care, declared its recent agreement amendment with SanyoSeiko Co., Ltd. This Japan-based contract manufacturer focuses on medical devices and precision engineering. The deal involves modifications to the Master Service Agreement and the Master Supply Agreement between the companies, solidifying their partnership.

data.title: Baghdadi Capital Group chooses nCino for global growth strategy, entering Spanish market with a trade and working capital firm.
data.description: nCino has made a significant move into the Spanish market by partnering with a prominent trade and working capital company. This partnership marks a strategic expansion for nCino in continental Europe. The move underscores nCino's commitment to growth and strengthening its foothold in key markets. This development brings nCino's total number of European markets to X, further solidifying its position as a key player in the region. The partnership is expected to enhance nCino's offerings and services to a broader client base and drive innovation in the financial technology sector.

data.title: TSCP's PestCo Holdings acquires Arizona's Best Choice Pest & Termite Services, expanding its national pest control services.
data.description: Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP), a private equity firm in St. Louis, has revealed the purchase of Arizona's Best Choice Pest & Termite Services (ABC) assets by PestCo Holdings, LLC (PestCo), a national pest control service provider part of TSCP's portfolio. ABC, headquartered in Phoenix, Arizona, is a prominent supplier of pest control services for residential and commercial clients in the state. This acquisition marks a strategic move by TSCP, expanding PestCo's reach and services in the pest control industry.

data.title: Global copper surplus of 178,000 tons in 2025 set to turn into 150,000 ton deficit due to supply-demand gap per ICSG.
data.description: The latest report from the International Copper Study Group (ICSG) indicates a significant shift in the global copper market. A surplus of 178,000 tons projected for 2025 is expected to transform into a deficit of 150,000 tons as demand outpaces supply. This shortage is largely due to lower refined copper production caused by constraints in copper concentrate availability. Despite a forecasted 2.3% increase in mine output in 2026, primarily from new capacities in Mongolia and Russia, disruptions in major producers like Chile, Indonesia, and the Democratic Republic of Congo will continue to impact the market. The demand for copper from Asia and the energy transition sectors is set to remain strong, further tightening the market. The rally in copper prices, though not as pronounced, could potentially deliver returns of 20-30% through 2027.

data.title: MAC Copper Limited is being acquired by Harmony Gold for 100% share capital, approved by Jersey Court.
data.description: In St. Helier, Jersey, MAC Copper Limited (NYSE: MTAL; ASX: MAC) is excited to share that the Royal Court of Jersey has approved the acquisition of 100% of MAC's issued share capital by Harmony Gold (Australia) Pty Ltd, a subsidiary of Harmony Gold Mining Company Limited (JSE: HAR, NYSE: HMY). The acquisition was authorized through a Jersey law scheme of arrangement. ARBN 671 963 198.

data.title: Global lawn mower market to reach $36.33 billion by 2032 from $23.97 billion in 2025, with a CAGR of 6.1%.
data.description: In DELRAY BEACH, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts the global lawn mower market to grow significantly from USD 23.97 billion in 2025 to an estimated USD 36.33 billion by 2032, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.1%. This indicates a substantial evolution in the lawn mower market trends over the coming years.
